# Node Interface

## FC PC

Note: Feature *should* work. No environment available to test it (yet).

Node selection options:
  - single node
  - selected nodes
  - all nodes
  - [multi APIC](./InterfaceFcPcNodesApics.md)

Filter options:
  - Interface ID
  - Admin State
  - Oper State

View options:
  - state
  - verbose

Output options:
  - default
  - json

Command options

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_fcpc.help:output
```
